name: SP8192 Tempered BPB-Weighted Loss + Easy-Chunk TTT + Late Loop Onset
author: Artem Buldin
technique_summary: SP8192 + late loop onset at step 2600 + pass-gated recurrence + easy-chunk legal TTT + tempered byte-weighted train loss + control-int8 packing
notes: Negative single-seed experiment. Tempering improved the raw BPB-weighted direction materially, but the best completed final metric was still quantized_sliding_window val_bpb 1.10290623 and the total submission size remained invalid at 16,065,507 bytes.
